title: A specific pattern is verilated into an infinite loop when optimizations are enabled

features.name: always block triggered by inout signal
features.description: Code should include an always block with sensitivity list containing an inout signal, which is not a standard input-driven trigger
features.snippet:
inout inoutSignal;
always @(inoutSignal) begin
  if (cond1) begin
    if (cond2) begin
      testTask;
    end
  end
end

features.name: task with delay called in nested conditionals
features.description: Code should include a task containing a timing delay (#1) that is called from within two levels of nested if statements inside an always block
features.snippet:
task testTask;
  begin
    #1;
  end
endtask

always @(inoutSignal) begin
  if (cond1) begin
    if (cond2) begin
      testTask;
    end
  end
end

features.name: nested conditional task call with inout trigger
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered by inout signal, with two nested if conditionals leading to a task call, where the task contains a delay statement
